description: Guardian module — operational physics for parents and guardians with read-only access to their assigned child's progress and escalation notifications. Guardians cannot intervene directly in student sessions or modify any domain data.

invariants.description: Guardians may only view data for children explicitly assigned to them via the assigned_children relationship. Queries for other students are rejected.
Guardians may not issue hints, resolve escalations, assign modules, or trigger any write operation on student sessions.
Guardian access requires an active consent record linking the guardian to the child. Expired or missing consent blocks all data access.

standing_orders.description: Inform the guardian that a valid consent record is required before child data can be accessed. If consent cannot be established, escalate to domain authority.
Send a notification to the guardian when their child's session produces an escalation event. Notification is informational only.
Make a periodic progress summary available for the guardian to review. Includes mastery progress, module status, and any flagged concerns.

escalation_triggers.condition: A guardian attempted to access child data but no valid consent record exists and the guardian has been notified.

roles.description: Parents or guardians who can view their assigned child's progress and receive escalation notifications. Read-only access.

guardians.description: Parents and guardians with view access to their assigned child's progress.

default_task_spec.description: Guardian landing — child progress viewing and notification receipt.
